slides.title: MetaFloor
slides.description: The AI for the million-dollar calls your supply chain makes in a panic.

slides.title: The Problem
slides.description: 2 a.m., a cable snaps: $150K/hr, and the answer takes 30 hours to assemble by hand.

slides.title: The Market
slides.description: A $40B decision layer on top of supply chain, entered through a funded wedge.

slides.title: The Solution
slides.description: Watch, assemble the answer, your people approve — and every call compounds.

slides.title: What's Unique
slides.description: We own the model and the framework; the memory it builds is the only thing that compounds.

slides.title: The Field
slides.description: Everyone owns one slice — no funded player holds all four; we run the whole decision.

slides.title: Go-to-Market
slides.description: Land through champions, prove on their data, expand — a 10-leader supply-chain bench.

slides.title: Proof
slides.description: Don't trust it forward — prove it backward on your own last 12 months, before you commit.

slides.title: Business Model
slides.description: Pick your size — an annual fee against the value it protects; the model rebuilds itself.

slides.title: The Team
slides.description: Built by operators — vouched for by the people who run these operations.

slides.title: The Ask
slides.description: Raising $2M to turn 10 champions into paid design partners.

slides.title: Executive Summary
slides.description: The whole story on one page: problem, market, product, moat, traction, team, ask.

slides.title: Thank You
slides.description: Fewer people. Faster decisions. Every decision makes the next one better.

slides.title: Backup — The Weekly Tax
slides.description: The loud crisis is rare; the same scramble leaks money in four places every week.

slides.title: Backup — The Product
slides.description: The decision, assembled: watch → assemble → execute, one hour, one decision.

slides.title: Backup — The Value
slides.description: Six ways it pays for itself, plus standing value every day.

slides.title: Backup — The Numbers
slides.description: One 40-minute decision, $3.1M protected; the rest is margin.

slides.title: Backup — Why Trust Us
slides.description: It proves itself, champions vouch, we were the buyer — safe to own.

slides.title: Backup — Why Now
slides.description: AI can finally read the unstructured half — and act on it.

slides.title: Backup — Three Desks
slides.description: Buyer, launch war-room, incident commander — one engine, three real desks.

slides.title: Backup — The Loop
slides.description: Capture → govern → let agents act: one governed-memory loop across three planes.

slides.title: Backup — The Moat Stack
slides.description: Short the model, long the memory: we own the whole vertical stack; only the model swaps.

slides.title: Backup — Architecture
slides.description: One vertical stack; the model is the only swappable part.
